MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Sam Wu, 415.886.7103 Defendant?moving party on his own behalf.
No other appearance.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SAM WU Motion To Strike Complaint is GRANTED. Moving party established that claim for malicious prosecution arises out of protected activity. Plaintiff failed to show that there is a probability of prevailing on the merits. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
